standard.setting: home at night; Phase Zero cleansing on dark deck with companion; TikTok transmissions indoors
standard.comeup_texture: deck fractals approach + scrub (the Cleansing, shared); euphoria; abrupt total inner silence
standard.peak_texture: oversoul remembrance; Operator/Avatar split; stasis-wake Command Mode; the Melt (near-OBE bliss); glitch-stutter
standard.afterglow_texture: gratitude, exhaustion; re-entry as 'Megan' at hour 5; visuals still strong, melting into them

weird.entity_hierarchy: THEY (senders) > Operator (non-local vibrational self, Command Mode capable) > Avatar ('Megan', meat interface); Mama Mushie (mycelial mechanic); fractal janitors (cleansing crew); fellow burners (kindness-test caste); cosmic firewall role
geometry_type: fractal pattern morphing (visuals as data stream)
weird.visual_frequency: melt-drift; glitch-stutter; command stillness; recursion echo; scream purge
weird.color_harmonics: teal/magenta complementary interference against burn-orange highlight on near-black
